SPLMTL_SAREA 
LABEL: 
Annual Managed Care Plan Record in Supplemental Service Area File 
DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there are one or more record(s) in the Service Area supplemental file for this 
managed care plan/entity (i.e., CCW_APL_LINK_KEY) . 
SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_SAREA 
LONG NAME: SPLMTL_SAREA 
TYPE: 
CHAR

1 
FILE(S): 
APL base
